title: Presumptive Taxation - Section 44AD and 44ADA | WorkIndex
matches: Section 44AD is for eligible small businesses and Section 44ADA is for specified professionals. The scheme allows declaring deemed profit at prescribed rates instead of maintaining detailed books and audit, subject to limits and conditions.
44AD
44ADA
Small trader deciding whether to use 44AD.
Doctor, CA, engineer or consultant comparing 44ADA with actual expenses.
44AD can be better when actual profit is above deemed rate.
44ADA can be easier when professional expenses are below 50%.

Presumptive Taxation - 44AD and 44ADA depends on the financial year, entity type, location, turnover, portal status, notice dates, transaction volume, documentation quality and whether past filings were done correctly.
